task: Using only the supplied embedded packet, compute all derived fields, classify each record per the margin rules, rank governing risk drivers, and recommend the smallest sufficient action (hold, release, retest, redesign, or targeted mitigation). Produce collision_cone_audit.xlsx (with formulas/executable logic and row-level citations) and planner_patch_note.md (decision table, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and final recommendation). Mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review and trigger expert-review if any record's classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift.
